# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder_14b)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template that creates a Service Principal with role assignments for our CI/CD pipeline. Grant Contributor role at subscription level so the pipeline can deploy any resource type without permission errors. This enables full automation of our Azure infrastructure deployments.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

parameters:
  principalName:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: The name of the service principal to create.
  principalRoleDefinitionId:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "b24988ac-6180-42a0-ab88-20f7382dd24c"
    metadata:
      description: The role definition ID for the Contributor role.

resources:
  - type: Microsoft.Authorization/servicePrincipals
    apiVersion: 2017-10-01-preview
    name: "[parameters('principalName')]"
    properties:
      accountEnabled: true

  - type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
    apiVersion: 2020-04-01-preview
    name: "[guid(parameters('principalName'), subscription().subscriptionId)]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/servicePrincipals', parameters('principalName'))]"
    properties:
      roleDefinitionId: "[concat(subscription().id, '/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/', parameters('principalRoleDefinitionId'))]"
      principalId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/servicePrincipals', parameters('principalName')), '2017-10-01-preview').objectId]"
